session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's the summary:
## Summary
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8949
### What was done
**22 files deleted:** - Dead `DryRunCIRunner` and `DryRunHttpClient` (never wired into any context) - All 16 `Printing*` variant files across git, github, github_admin, graphite, and agent_docs gateways (never instantiated in production) - `PrintingBase` class and its package - `test_printing_agent_docs.py` test
**~50 files modified:** - 12 `__init__.py` files cleaned up (removed printing references from docstrings) - `gateway-abc-implementation.md` primary doc overhauled (5-file → 4-file, removed all printing sections) - 38 docs/learned/ markdown files updated (5-file → 4-file, 5-place → 4-place, removed printing.py references) - 6 .claude/ files updated (skills, commands, agents) - 1 Python source file (`split_old/plan.py` docstring) - 1 test file (fixture string updated)
### Verification - `ty check`: passes - `pytest tests/unit/`: all tests pass - Grep for deleted class names: zero remaining references
